With Lex Fridman, "[Unix] was meant to be an environment where it was really
easy to write programs."
[\[00:23:10\]](https://www.happyscribe.com/public/lex-fridman-podcast-artificial-intelligence-ai/109-brian-kernighan-unix-c-awk-ampl-and-go-programming#paragraph_1371)
He went on to explain why he often still uses AWK rather than writing a Python.
